category_sources: source_facts.description says viewer for large images; official GitHub repository describes vipsdisp as a tiny libvips/GTK4 image viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vipsdisp; official GitHub repository is libvips/vipsdisp after the official homepage redirect.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for usage and build details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jcupitt/vipsdisp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says viewer for large images; source_facts.executables lists vipsdisp; official GitHub topics include image, libvips, image-viewer, and gtk4.
